hooks.command: $d=[Console]::In.ReadToEnd()|ConvertFrom-Json; if($d.tool_input.command -imatch 'pyinstaller'){$f='C:\Users\Notebiz002\Documents\stock-realtime-view\.build_restart_flag'; $p=Get-Process -Name StockViewer -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if($p){Stop-Process -Name StockViewer -Force; '1'|Set-Content $f -Encoding UTF8; Write-Host '[빌드 훅] StockViewer.exe 종료됨'}else{Remove-Item $f -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue}}
hooks.statusMessage: 빌드 전 StockViewer 상태 확인 중...

hooks.command: $f='C:\Users\Notebiz002\Documents\stock-realtime-view\.build_restart_flag'; if(Test-Path $f){Remove-Item $f -Force; Start-Process 'C:\Users\Notebiz002\Documents\stock-realtime-view\dist\StockViewer.exe'; Write-Host '[빌드 훅] StockViewer.exe 재시작됨'}
